blended.narrative: Hoodoo is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.1 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,002 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 5".
